note: Operator-maintained. Estimated cost at current API rates; on a subscription the real bill is usage-limit-based, so $ is a clearly-derived secondary figure — the raw token components are primary. Cache multipliers are model-independent and applied to each model's input rate (the TTL split is load-bearing: a 1h cache write is 2x, a 5m write 1.25x, a read 0.1x). A model absent from `models` prices as `unknown`, never silently $0.
